title: Block analysis when no input is provided
description: Verifies attempting to start analysis without providing a PDF or pasted text is blocked with a visible validation error and no analysis run begins.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the analysis request
Verify a validation error is visible indicating input is required
Verify the loading overlay does not appear

title: Run the live sample and view canonical English result
description: Verifies a user can trigger the live sample analysis from the landing page and reach the result view showing canonical English with glossary context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Verify the user lands on the result view with side-by-side Marathi and canonical English displayed
Verify glossary context is displayed alongside the results

title: View glossary context after running the live sample analysis
description: This test verifies a user can run the live sample from the landing page and then see glossary-linked context in the result view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the live sample run from the landing page
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Verify the user lands on the result view with side-by-side source Marathi and canonical English displayed
Verify glossary-linked highlights and associated context are displayed in the result view

title: Paste Marathi text and analyze to get side-by-side results
description: Verifies a user can paste Marathi text on the landing page, run analysis, and reach the result view with side-by-side Marathi and canonical English.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a Marathi text sample into the pasted text input
Submit the analysis request
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Verify the user lands on the result view with side-by-side Marathi and canonical English displayed

title: Analyze an uploaded Marathi PDF to get side-by-side results
description: Verifies a user can load the built-in Marathi PDF sample, start analysis after browser-side preparation, and reach the result view with side-by-side Marathi and canonical English.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the button with data-testid use-sample-pdf-button to preload the built-in same-origin Marathi PDF sample into the upload flow
Click Analyze your document once after the sample PDF is attached
Wait for the loading overlay to complete and for the URL to change to /result
Verify Source text and Canonical translation are both visible on the result page

title: Generate translations into selected Indian languages without losing existing results
description: Verifies a user with an existing result can select one or more target languages, generate translations, and see new language sections added while canonical English remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Open the language selector
Select one or more target Indian languages
Request generation of the selected language outputs
Verify new Indian-language output sections are displayed in the result view
Verify canonical English and glossary context remain displayed

title: Open expanded glossary and quality context from the result view
description: This test verifies a user can navigate from the result view to the details view and see expanded setup, glossary status, and quality context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the live sample run from the landing page
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Open the details view from the result view
Verify the details view displays setup information, glossary status, and quality summary content

title: Generate a plain explanation output and append it to the result
description: Verifies a user can request a plain explanation from the result view and see it appear without rerunning the full analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Request the plain explanation output
Verify a plain explanation section is displayed in the result view
Verify canonical English remains displayed

title: Generate key actions output and append it to the result
description: Verifies a user can request key actions from the result view and see them appear without rerunning the full analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Request the key actions output
Verify a key actions section is displayed in the result view
Verify canonical English and glossary context remain displayed

title: Inspect glossary match context by hovering a highlighted term in Marathi
description: This test verifies hovering a glossary-highlighted term in the Marathi panel reveals its glossary match and localization context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the live sample run from the landing page
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Hover over a glossary-highlighted term in the Marathi panel
Verify a glossary match context view appears for the hovered term

title: Inspect glossary match context by hovering a highlighted term in canonical English
description: This test verifies hovering a glossary-highlighted term in the canonical English panel reveals its glossary match and localization context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the button with data-testid try-live-sample-button to run the live sample
Wait for the loading overlay to complete and for the result page to appear
Hover a highlighted glossary term inside the Canonical translation panel
Verify the Glossary match card is visible and includes both Source term and Canonical meaning

title: Open expanded details after a live sample run
description: Verifies a user can run the live sample and then navigate to the details view to see expanded setup/glossary/quality context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Click the link to open the expanded result details
Verify the expanded details view is displayed with setup, glossary status, and quality summary sections visible

title: Show validation when an invalid file type is uploaded
description: Verifies uploading a non-PDF file is rejected with a visible validation error preventing analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a non-PDF file using the document upload control
Submit the analysis request
Verify a validation error is visible indicating the upload is invalid
Verify the loading overlay does not appear

title: Prevent generating translations when no target language is selected
description: Verifies the result view blocks translation generation when no target language is selected and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the button with data-testid try-live-sample-button to run the live sample
Wait for the loading overlay to complete and for the result page to appear
Do not select any new target languages from the language menu
Click Generate translation once with zero selected target languages
Verify the visible error text says Please select at least one target language before requesting translations.
Verify no Lingo localized outputs section is added

title: Details view loads with no prior analysis result in the current session
description: This test verifies that opening the details view directly without running an analysis shows a deterministic empty state rather than analysis-specific content.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/details
Verify an empty state or prompt is displayed indicating there is no analysis result to show
Verify setup and glossary status sections are still accessible or a clear guidance is provided from this view

title: Navigate from details view to the hidden glossary status page for cross-checking
description: This test verifies a user can move from the details view to the hidden glossary status page to review glossary readiness context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the live sample run from the landing page
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Open the details view from the result view
Navigate to the hidden glossary status page from within the app navigation
Verify glossary status information is displayed on the hidden glossary page

title: View the hidden glossary status page as read-only
description: This test verifies the hidden glossary status page loads and presents glossary status information in a read-only manner.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Verify glossary status information is displayed
Verify no editing controls are available for modifying glossary entries

title: Show the result empty state when the result page is opened without session data
description: Verifies navigating directly to the result page without running an analysis shows the empty state guidance instead of stale analysis content.

steps.description: Navigate directly to /result in a fresh browser session
Verify the result page shows an empty state prompting the user to run an analysis first
Verify a navigation link back to the upload screen is visible

title: Run the baseline comparison from the details view after a live sample analysis
description: Verifies a user can open the details view after a successful analysis, run the baseline comparison, and see a canonical-vs-baseline comparison panel.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the live sample run from the landing page
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Open the details view from the result view
Run the baseline comparison action
Verify the details view shows both the current canonical result and the baseline result without glossary hints

title: Generate language outputs and then add a plain explanation without losing the translations
description: Verifies optional outputs remain additive by first generating one or more language outputs and then appending the plain explanation in the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Wait for the loading overlay to complete
Open the language selector and choose one or more target Indian languages
Request generation of the selected language outputs
Request the plain explanation output
Verify the generated language sections remain visible after the plain explanation appears
Verify canonical English remains displayed alongside the new explanation

title: Use the hidden glossary route and return to the homepage
description: Verifies the hidden glossary route is reachable for demos and that the built-in navigation can return the user to the main landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Verify the read-only glossary status content is displayed
Use the page navigation to go back to the home page
Verify the landing page is displayed with both the live sample and upload entry points
